✅ Good keto choice. Only 1g net carb per serving. Good fiber and moderate calories. Protein is decent at 10g, but pair it with eggs, chicken, turkey, or another protein if trying to hit your daily protein goal.

Nutritional Tracker Pro

Read-only 30/60/90 day nutrition trends for doctor visit preparation.

Nutritional Tracker Pro

Standalone module · reads daily totals only · never writes back to Food Log, Stats, Coach, Ask AI, or food records.
READ ONLY
Architecture Lock: Food Log → Stats → Nutritional Tracker Pro. Nutritional Tracker Pro never sends data back to existing systems.

Metric Controls

▼
Selected metrics stay local and are used only by this tracker page.

Trend Graph

30 Day View

Nutritional Targets

▼
Targets are used only for tracker percentages, risk colors, scoring, and reports.

Ask AI

▼
Nutrition trend analyst. Mic and talk-back use the same standard Fast Life Fitness voice setup. No meal generation, no edits to Food Log, Stats, Coach, Ask AI, Goals, or Supabase food records.
Ask your question in the box above. No preset tabs are used in this Ask AI section.
Ask AI is ready. Ask a question about your 30/60/90 day nutrition trends.
Safety: education and trend analysis only. No diagnosis, medication advice, or replacement for a physician.
